Container.Name: 3DS_Hacks_Guide_Docker
Container.ReadMe: Vibe-coded I made this for myself. I made it public so it may be useful for other people that is all.
Container.Overview:
A complete guide to 3DS custom firmware, from stock to boot9strap.
This has been converted to docker by me using ZED. I plan on making another version with all the files included.
Original content available at https://3ds.hacks.guide/ Repo at https://github.com/hacks-guide/Guide_3DS
